data.content: Implemented the all-repositories fix on branch foolery-121b. RepoSwitcher now bootstraps repo selection only once so selecting All Repositories remains sticky instead of being overwritten on registry refresh. AppHeader routes both the add button and Shift+N through a controlled repo chooser when multiple repos are available and no repo is selected, forcing an explicit repo choice before opening CreateBeatDialog. Added source-contract tests covering the one-shot repo bootstrap and chooser-driven create flow. Quality gates passed in /Users/cartine/foolery-121b: bun run lint (warnings only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Commit: 07a6d6a1f190.
